heading: Lack of effect on covenant
label: 1756 Lack of effect on covenant
text: No provision of this subchapter shall be construed to alter, amend, or abrogate any provision of the covenant referred to in except section 901 of the covenant.section 1751 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 711–718) of title VII of , , , which enacted this subchapter and amended sections 4342, 6954 and 9432 of Title 10, Armed Forces. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub.
